classes.name: Learner
classes.description: A learner in the SLE

classes.name: Teacher
classes.description: A teacher in the SLE

classes.name: LearningSystem
classes.description: The system that supports learning in the SLE

classes.name: LearningActivity
classes.description: An activity that takes place in the SLE

classes.name: LearningResource
classes.description: A resource used in the SLE

classes.name: LearningAnalytics
classes.description: Data collected on learning in the SLE

classes.name: Student
classes.description: A type of learner who is actively engaged in a course or assignment.

classes.name: Learning System
classes.description: A system that supports and enables learning activities.

classes.name: Learning Platform
classes.description: A digital platform that provides a space for learning activities to take place.

classes.name: Adaptive System
classes.description: A system that adjusts its content or pace based on the learner's needs and progress.

classes.name: Learning Activity
classes.description: An event or task that is designed to promote learning.

classes.name: Course
classes.description: A structured series of learning activities.

classes.name: Assignment
classes.description: A specific task or project that is part of a larger course.

classes.name: Project
classes.description: A longer-term learning activity that requires students to apply their knowledge and skills.

classes.name: Learning Resource
classes.description: A material or tool that supports learning, such as a textbook or online resource.

classes.name: Textbook
classes.description: A written work that provides information and instruction on a particular subject.

classes.name: Online Resource
classes.description: A digital resource that provides access to learning materials, such as videos or articles.

classes.name: Multimedia Resource
classes.description: A resource that includes multiple forms of media, such as images, audio, and video.

classes.name: Learning Analytics
classes.description: The process of collecting, analyzing, and interpreting data about learning activities and outcomes.

classes.name: Performance Metrics
classes.description: Quantitative measures used to evaluate student performance and progress.

classes.name: Learning Outcomes
classes.description: The skills, knowledge, or attitudes that students are expected to acquire as a result of a learning activity.
